prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock twin-scroll turbochargers (Garrett MGT2259S) on the 3.3L Lambda II T-GDi V6 (G6DH) with a pair of Garrett GTX3576R Gen II turbos, featuring 62mm compressor wheels and 76mm turbine wheels, paired with custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipes (CPE) and a Tomei 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system with N1-style mufflers for optimized spool and 550+ WHP potential.

Fuel System: Upgrade to a full Radium Engineering fuel system, including a dual-pump surge tank (20-0111), 1050cc ID1050x injectors, and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for precise lambda control and ethanol compatibility (E85).

Suspension & Handling: Install a full KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable) with custom valving for the Stinger’s 5-link rear suspension, paired with SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms) and a Whiteline 27mm rear sway bar (BSK016) to eliminate torque steer and improve mid-corner adjustability.
estetica: Aero: Fit a full Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (LW-KIA-STINGER) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and a Vortex Generator roof spoiler (Seibon Carbon) for reduced lift at high speeds.

Wheels: Mount a set of WORK Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +30 (front) and 19x11.5 +35 (rear) wheels in a custom bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 295/30/19 rear) for maximum mechanical grip.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with a pair of Recaro SPG XL bucket seats (with Kia-specific mounting brackets), paired with a custom roll cage (Autopower bolt-in 8-point) and a full Alcantara headliner (EuroCompulsion), including a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel and a Motec C127 dash display for real-time telemetry.
